headline: Can Netflix Failed Warner Bros. Merger Be What Sends Earnings Soaring?
summary: Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) reports first-quarter 2026 results on April 16, after the market close. With the Warner Bros. Discovery deal now off the table and a $2.8 billion breakup fee headed Netflix’s way, investors want to know whether the company’s organic growth story can carry the quarter. From Merger Drama to Business as Usual Netflix walked ... Can Netflix Failed Warner Bros. Merger Be What Sends Earnings Soaring?
